news.t: State Street Investment Management Expands Industry's First Actively Managed Corporate Target Maturity ETFs Suite

overview.description: The State Street My2031 High Yield Corporate Bond ETF (MYHE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund invests in below investment grade US corporate bonds, pursuing a target maturity strategy. The fund is actively managed, using fundamental and risk-aware analysis MYHE was launched on Feb 25, 2026 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: State Street Investment Management Expands Industry's First Actively Managed Corporate Target Maturity ETFs Suite
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--State Street Investment Management announced today the launch of five actively managed target maturity high yield corporate bond ETFs. In providing access to high yield bonds ...
